name: TextLocation
summary: Location of the dimension text relative to the dimension line

enum_values.name: eBASIS_DIM_BOTTOM_CENTER
enum_values.summary: Below the line, in the middle

enum_values.name: eBASIS_DIM_BOTTOM_LEFT
enum_values.summary: Below the line, at the start

enum_values.name: eBASIS_DIM_BOTTOM_RIGHT
enum_values.summary: Below the line, at the end

enum_values.name: eBASIS_DIM_CENTER
enum_values.summary: On the line, in the middle

enum_values.name: eBASIS_DIM_CENTER_LEFT
enum_values.summary: On the line, at the start

enum_values.name: eBASIS_DIM_CENTER_RIGHT
enum_values.summary: On the line, at the end

enum_values.name: eBASIS_DIM_TOP_CENTER
enum_values.summary: Above the line, in the middle

enum_values.name: eBASIS_DIM_TOP_LEFT
enum_values.summary: Above the line, at the start

enum_values.name: eBASIS_DIM_TOP_RIGHT
enum_values.summary: Above the line, at the end
